actions.summary: Grounded critical architectural knowledge from 3/19-3/20 human-driven cron timeout investigation: abort signal kills failover (all 21 candidates rejected in ~10ms), log blind spot (no per-LLM-request HTTP timing), and timeout sizing strategy.
Added Timeout策略 section with sizing formula, experience-value table by task type, and mitigation checklist. Updated model distribution table to 18 jobs (3/20 overhaul).
ct_042 (ENOENT daily log): 3 clean cycles → converged. ct_043 (feed-broadcast timeout): 2nd clean cycle, tracking. ct_037 (记忆整合 edit): still awaiting 3/22 run.

Converged ct_043 (feed-broadcast timeout): 3+ clean cycles, lastDuration=62s well within 900s budget. Archived to convergence-archive.jsonl. ct_037 (记忆整合 edit idempotency) still awaiting next run 2026-03-22.

Minor note: source #14 (dynamic search) instruction is vague. No fixes needed.

Cron integration stable: avg 41s runtime within 900s budget, lightContext enabled. Yesterday's double-timeout at 600s was fixed by evt_163 (timeout→900s). Feed repo active with regular commits. No issues found.
Bumped timeout 300→600s. Evidence: 3/20 investigation showed ZAI glm-5-turbo 4m3s hang, same failure class as ct_043 (feed-broadcast, now converged). Typical runs 27s, 600s provides safe margin.

Full audit: SKILL.md well-structured (264 lines, mostly code blocks). Data pipeline healthy — 24 articles today, 34 yesterday, candidates.json properly cleared. Cron runtime ~267s within 900s budget. seen.json healthy (dict with 'entries' key). Minor cosmetic: article sequence gaps on 3/20 (019, 026 missing) — likely Step 5 validation deletions, not functional issue. No fixes needed.

Fixed SKILL.md path reference: replaced vague '<available_skills> lookup' with explicit path /data/code/github.com/best/openclaw-skills/discord-thread-archiver/SKILL.md. Eliminates ~28 ENOENT errors/day (84 over 3 days). Matches working pattern from feed-collect/score/broadcast crons.

Full audit: SKILL.md well-structured (116 lines), judgment criteria table comprehensive with anti-hallucination guard, 5 examples (3 correct + 2 wrong patterns). Token optimization rules present. No code fixes needed. Mature enough for v1.0 but no functional issues.
ct_037 (记忆整合 edit): still open awaiting 3/22 03:00 run. ct_044 (Thread归档 timeout): 2 clean runs since fix, monitoring. ct_045 (Thread归档 ENOENT path): new, fix applied, verify at evt_172.
New tracker: Feed-score cron (802b31b9) 'Write failed: Missing required parameter: path'. ZAI glm-5-turbo dropped path param in write() call. Single occurrence — monitoring, no prompt/skill fix yet.

ct_037 (记忆整合 edit): awaiting 3/22 03:00 run. ct_044 (Thread归档 timeout): 4+ clean runs, all ~20s, trending converge at evt_171. ct_045 (Thread归档 ENOENT path): fix deployed ~20:01 CST, 0 errors since, first clean run under new prompt pending ~21:05. ct_046 (feed-score write): new, monitoring.

Script scans per-date efficiently. SKILL.md accurate (matches script behavior). Cron jobs (daily + weekly) both lastStatus=ok. No fixes needed — mature and stable.

Audit found broken link conversion: link_replace opened markdown link bracket but never closed it or added URL. All in articles became [text fragments. Fixed with proper regex that captures full ... and converts to [text](url). Bumped v1.0.0 → v1.0.1, committed + pushed.
ct_037 (记忆整合 edit): 5th cycle tracking, awaiting 3/24 03:00 run. ct_046 (feed-score write): terminal/converged, will archive next cycle.

ct_037 (记忆整合 edit): 6th cycle, awaiting 3/24 03:00 run. Will verify or close at evt_177. ct_046 (feed-score write): terminal, archived.

Full audit: architecturally orphaned since 3-agent split (dev-mgr/dev-engineer/review-engineer replaced monolithic patrol loop). Not referenced by any active cron. code-reviewer SKILL.md has a stale reference. Contains useful CC patterns (prompt templates, failure detection, breakpoint resume) but as a patrol skill it is dead code. Last modified Feb 27. No active problems — not actively misleading anyone since no cron reads it. Low priority cleanup candidate.
Removed stale cc-iterator references from Mode A description and Integration Notes. cc-iterator is architecturally orphaned since 3-agent split (flagged by evt_177 audit).
ct_047 (credential leak in daily log): 3/22-23 logs both clean, 2 cycles observed. 1 more cycle to converge.

Full audit: clean single-file skill (130 lines SKILL.md, no scripts). Anti-hallucination guard well-designed with explicit wrong-verdict examples. Cron runs 14x/day via GLM-5-turbo+lightContext, 76s avg duration within 600s budget. Token-optimized (one thread-list call, limit=5 reads). No fixes needed — mature and effective.
Grounded 三层职责分离 principle (Cron/SKILL.md/references) from feed-score v2.0.1 refactoring lesson as reusable design reference.
Audit found missing version field in frontmatter (README tracked v1.2.0 but SKILL.md had none). Added version: 1.2.0.
Credential leak pattern: 3rd clean cycle (3/23 log scanned, no credential patterns). Marked converged + archived.
Grounded delivery delegation principle: both Cron prompt and SKILL.md must have explicit message targets. Added from feed-broadcast 串台 root cause (stale sessionKey + missing target = wrong channel).
Added lightContext:true to both cron jobs. They only need their SKILL.md + web tools, not full workspace context. Saves ~2K tokens per run x 24 runs/day.

Full audit: clean SKILL.md (185 lines), defensive seen.json schema validation on both read/write, 14 sources well-defined. Pipeline healthy (539 seen entries, candidates cycling correctly). Cron 503s avg within 900s budget. No structural issues.
Added explicit guardrail: forbid edit tool on feed repo files. GLM model deviated from exec/python workflow, used edit with 3-char oldText causing failure (649s near timeout).
ct_048 (feed-broadcast 串台): 2nd clean cycle. feed-broadcast lastRun 17:01 CST ok (17s). 1 more cycle needed.

Full audit: clean architecture post-refactoring. SKILL.md 56 lines (lean orchestration), scoring-rules.md 114 lines (self-contained), generate-posts.py 166 lines (robust validation). Cron avg 12.6s within 900s budget. Version sync correct. No fixes needed.

SKILL.md Step 5+7 still used delegation language (按 Cron Prompt 指定) — the exact pattern that caused ct_048 串台. Replaced with explicit fail-on-missing-target guardrail. Dual-explicit principle now enforced at both SKILL.md and Cron prompt layers.

Full audit: 3.4KB SKILL.md + 3 scripts (upload 3.5KB, list 1.1KB, delete 1.3KB). Version sync correct across README/README_CN/SKILL.md. 106 uploads logged, actively used (last Mar 16). upload.sh robust: set -euo pipefail, API key validation, non-ASCII title fallback, temp file cleanup, auto-logging. Minor finding: list.sh grep -v DELETED is overly broad (could filter titles containing the word) but zero practical impact. Metadata guide comprehensive. No fixes needed — mature and stable.
0 open items. All 5 recent trackers (ct_037→ct_050) converged and archived. System at full convergence for 2nd consecutive cycle.

Added consecutive_errors deduplication to all 3 balance check scripts. First API failure outputs silent (suppressed), second consecutive outputs error (alert). Prevents false alarm notifications from transient API issues.
Grounded Feishu doc auto-permission pattern: always call feishu_perm after creating docs from non-Feishu sources (Discord/Cron/CLI). Prevents silent grant_to_requester failures.
Tracked cron broadcast misdirection fix (3/23) and Feishu permission human-intervention (3/24). ct_051 balance dedup: 1st clean cycle.

Found and fixed incomplete consecutive_errors dedup: 'ok' path didn't reset counter after transient failure. Scenario error→success→error would falsely escalate. Added conditional reset in ok branch of all 3 scripts.
111-line SKILL.md, version sync correct. Strong anti-misdirection guard (explicit cron prompt targets + reject-if-missing). Clean structure. No scripts needed. No fixes required.
